pr.title: fix: add edge runtime for Cloudflare Pages deployment
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds `export const runtime = 'edge'` to `/api/chat/route.ts` to fix Cloudflare Pages build error. Cloudflare Pages requires all non-static routes to use the Edge Runtime.

**Error fixed:**
```
ERROR: Failed to produce a Cloudflare Pages build from the project.
The following routes were not configured to run with the Edge Runtime:
  - /api/chat
```

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] After merging, retry Cloudflare Pages deployment — build should succeed
- [ ] Test the `/api/chat` endpoint still works correctly with your API key

### Notes
- This is a one-line change: `export const runtime = 'edge'` added to `src/app/api/chat/route.ts`
- The Edge Runtime uses Web APIs (fetch, Response, Request) which the route already uses — no other changes needed

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8fc7e30c5a6543d8aef8ed81385daf74
Requested by: @kelenagi
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
